verdict_reasoning: STIM1 is a single-pass type I TM protein resident in the ER membrane, with its N-terminal EF-SAM domain in the ER lumen and C-terminus in cytosol. On ER store depletion it clusters at ER-PM junctions to gate Orai channels. A documented minority pool also traffics to the plasma membrane where the N-terminus becomes extracellular and is antibody-accessible, particularly upon store depletion. Dominant compartment is ER, but a real surface fraction exists.
